git commit -m "Add V7 Device Authorization Flow to navigation menu and routing

- Added Device Authorization (V7 Unified) to 'V7 New Flows' section in sidebar
- Used smartphone icon with amber color (#f59e0b) for device theme
- Added descriptive badge: 'Unified OAuth/OIDC device authorization for TVs, IoT devices, and CLI tools'
- Added import for DeviceAuthorizationFlowV7 in App.tsx
- Added route '/flows/device-authorization-v7' pointing to V7 component
- Maintains consistent styling with other V7 flows in the menu

Users can now access the V7 unified device authorization flow through:
Navigation: V7 New Flows > Device Authorization (V7 Unified)
Direct URL: /flows/device-authorization-v7"

  -d "{
    \"environmentId\": \"b9817c16-9910-4415-b67e-4ac687da74d9\",
    \"userId\": \"5adc497b-dde7-44c6-a003-9b84f8038ff9\",
    \"workerToken\": \"$WORKER_TOKEN\",
    \"password\": \"WrongPassword123!\"
  }" | jq .
tail -100 backend.log | grep -A 20 "Password check failed - Full PingOne"
tail -200 backend.log | grep -A 15 "Password check failed" | tail -20
ps aux | grep -E "vite|npm.*dev|yarn.*dev" | grep -v grep | head -5
grep -r "fetch\(" src/services/ --include="*.ts" | grep "/api/" | grep -v "trackedFetch" | cut -d: -f1 | sort | uniq
find src/pages/flows -name "*V7*.tsx" -o -name "*v7*.tsx" | grep -v backup | grep -v archive | sort
find src/pages/flows -name "*V7*.tsx" -o -name "*v7*.tsx" | grep -v backup | grep -v archive | grep -v BACKUP | grep -v Backup | xargs ls -lt | head -20

for file in src/components/UltimateTokenDisplay.tsx src/components/StandardizedTokenDisplay.tsx src/components/TokenDisplay.tsx src/components/ColoredTokenDisplay.tsx src/components/JWTTokenDisplay.tsx src/components/InlineTokenDisplay.tsx; do echo "=== $file ==="; head -20 "$file" | grep -E "^//|interface.*Props|export.*TokenDisplay"; echo ""; done

cat > /tmp/fix_links.txt << 'EOF'
Users: #users
Groups: #groups  
Roles: #roles
Populations: #populations
MFA: #mfa
Passwords: #user-password-management
Consents: #user-consent
Licenses: #licenses
EOF
cat /tmp/fix_links.txt
